Mojave Ghost
Byredo (2014)

Mojave Ghost fragrance notes

  • Head

    • ambrette seed, sapodilla fruit

  • Heart

    • violet, sandalwood, magnolia

  • Base

    • ambergris, cedarwood

Ectoplasmic. A wisp of something and then poof, it's gone. Spooky.

Mai7
The thing I like most about Byredo fragrances is their names. Yes, names.
They sound cool and are very evocative and Mojave ghost is one of my favourites.
